description_long: This sculpture depicts a crowned female figure, possibly a queen or saint, standing upright with long flowing hair and draped robes. She holds a scepter in her right hand and an open book in her left, suggesting themes of wisdom and authority. The figure's face is serene and delicately carved, with detailed features and a gentle expression. The robes are intricately sculpted, with folds and layers that create a sense of movement and depth. The crown and scepter are prominent, adding to the regal appearance. The sculpture is painted in muted tones of gold, brown, and cream, with some areas showing signs of wear.
description: A crowned female figure in flowing robes holds a scepter and an open book, exuding regal and serene authority. The sculpture is detailed, with muted gold, brown, and cream tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full figure, crown, scepter, open book, and detailed facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the robes and the profile of the face, with the scepter and book partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the long, textured hair and the back of the robes, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the book and scepter from a different angle, with the profile of the face and the draping of the robes.
attribute_subject_matter: crowned female figure holding a scepter and book
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
